summary: Hardcoded 'congrats' fix and public page improvements VERIFIED - All card types (birthday, thankyou, holiday, welcome, anniversary, congrats) now use correct headlines/messages. Inline review forms and Refer a Friend sections present on all public pages.

card_type_template_defaults.details: GET /api/congrats/template returns correct headline per card_type (birthday->Happy Birthday!, thankyou->Thank You!, holiday->Happy Holidays!, etc.)

birthday_card_creation.details: POST /api/congrats/create with card_type=birthday creates card with 'Happy Birthday!' headline (not 'Congratulations!')

thankyou_card_creation.details: POST /api/congrats/create with card_type=thankyou creates card with 'Thank You!' headline

holiday_card_creation.details: POST /api/congrats/create with card_type=holiday creates card with 'Happy Holidays!' headline

short_url_link_type.details: Short URL created with link_type='{card_type}_card' (e.g. birthday_card, not congrats_card)

digital_card_page_review_cta.details: /card/{userId} has 'Had a great experience? Tap to leave a review' CTA with inline form

digital_card_page_refer_friend.details: /card/{userId} has 'Know someone who could use my services? Tap to refer a friend' section

congrats_card_inline_review.details: /congrats/{cardId} has inline review form (not redirect to /p/)

congrats_card_refer_friend.details: /congrats/{cardId} has Refer a Friend section at bottom

showcase_inline_review.details: /showcase/{id} has inline review form with star rating

verified_features: Card type defaults: birthday=Happy Birthday!, thankyou=Thank You!, holiday=Happy Holidays!, welcome=Welcome!, anniversary=Happy Anniversary!, congrats=Congratulations!
photo_source in contacts.update uses card_type (not hardcoded 'congrats')
Digital card page (/card/{userId}): Review CTA after Quick Actions, Refer a Friend section, no back button
Congrats card page (/congrats/{cardId}): Inline review form (no redirect), Refer a Friend, no back button
Showcase page (/showcase/{id}): Inline review form, Refer a Friend section, no back button
critical_code_review_comments: congrats_cards.py line 282-302: photo_source now uses card_type variable (not hardcoded 'congrats')
congrats_cards.py line 350-355: Short URL link_type uses f'{card_type}_card'
congrats_cards.py line 401-409: Card view event uses card_type-specific event_type mapping
congrats_cards.py line 487-500: Track download/share uses {card_type}_card_{action} event names
Frontend card/[userId].tsx: Review CTA + Refer a Friend added after Quick Actions
Frontend congrats/[cardId].tsx: Inline review form with star rating, Refer a Friend banner
Frontend showcase/[id].tsx: Inline review form, Refer a Friend section

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Digital card, Congrats card, Showcase pages all working correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created test cards with card_type=birthday, thankyou, holiday for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hardcoded 'congrats' fix verified - all card types use correct headlines and event tracking. Public pages (digital card, congrats card, showcase) now have inline review forms and Refer a Friend sections. No back buttons on public pages.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
